Image Comparison Metrics Suite Report

This report presents the quantitative evaluation of the Image Comparison Metrics Suite across 24 generative combinations (6 intensity changes × 4 shape changes) and showcases a visual registration demonstration using SyNTo.

1. Generative Space Evaluation

The table below summarizes the comparison metric scores computed against the image pair space generated by CrossProductGenerator. All metric scores are standardized such that a lower score indicates better similarity.

2. Visual Registration Diagnostic Report

The visual assets below showcase the registration performance of SyNTo on a deformed pair simulated with additive noise and a non-rigid grid deformation.

Target/Fixed vs Original Moving (Side-by-Side)

Visual representation of the simulated images. Left shows the fixed target image; right shows the original moving image before any registration.

Edge / Region Overlap

Overlap overlay using Sobel gradients. Red indicates boundaries in the moving image, and green indicates boundaries in the fixed image.

Deformed Coordinate Grid

Visualizes the coordinate warping applied by the registration transformation.

Jacobian Determinant Map

Illustrates local compression and expansion. Values centered around 1.0 (white/grey) represent no change; values < 1.0 (blue) indicate local compression, and values > 1.0 (red) indicate local expansion.

3. Generative Space Examples

Below are specific examples of the simulated fixed and moving images across various magnitudes of shape and intensity differences. These visualizations display the simulated original moving image alongside its ground truth spatial properties.

4. Evaluation Results & Metric Ranking

This table ranks the metrics by their Spearman correlation with the ground truth total distance (Shape Distance + Intensity Difference). A higher positive correlation indicates the metric successfully penalizes distance changes. Click on column headers to sort.

Metric Shape_Distance_Correlation Intensity_Difference_Correlation Total_Distance_Correlation
resnet_2_lncc 0.4070 0.5252 0.7574
ncc 0.3939 0.5428 0.7452
mse 0.3957 0.5569 0.7443
psnr 0.3852 0.5815 0.7322
dino_2_lncc 0.3670 0.5992 0.6957
gradient_correlation 0.3113 0.5569 0.6704
vgg_4_lncc 0.3217 0.5675 0.6696
ssim 0.2104 0.6238 0.5870
ngf_e1 0.4652 -0.1022 0.1843
swin_2_lncc NaN NaN NaN

Top 3 Metrics vs Total Distance Scatter Plots

A strong positive monotonic relationship demonstrates the metric accurately captures total image distance regardless of the type of intensity artifact.
